title: Crops Time Growth Editor
description: This allows you to change the growth speed of crops.
body:
**What this mod does:** This mod allows you to change the speed of crops growing.

**How to use it?:** This is easily done using the "/setcropgrowth" command where you can set your desired number with no max; however, due to minecraft's poor coding, if the number is set to something too high, it just could not work.
